reviews.name: 여름
reviews.content:
한 쪽 벨크로 마감과 가볍고 편안한 소재로 입힐 때나, 입고 활동 할 때나 다 편한 옷이었어요~!
정말 크로와상처럼 빵실하고 귀여워서 사진도 예쁘게 잘 나와요! 특히 위에서 볼 때랑 뒷 모습이 정말.. 너무너무 귀여워요 ♡ 게다가 강아지랑 커플템으로 착용할 수 있는 스크런치가 있어서 더더 좋았습니다!
(털찐 상태의 3kg 비숑프리제인데 사이즈는 편하게 잘 맞았습니다!)
reviews.content_en:
It's such a comfortable outfit to put on and wear thanks to the one-sided velcro closure and lightweight, cozy fabric~! It really looks fluffy and cute like a croissant, so photos turn out so pretty! Especially the top view and back are just... so adorable ♡ Plus, it came with a scrunchie that I can wear as a matching set with my pup, which made it even better!
(My 3kg Bichon Frise was fully fluffed up and the size fit perfectly and comfortably!)

reviews.name: 꾸***
reviews.content:
벚꽃 놀이에 입고 가려고 준비했던 옷인데 미리 입고 애견 놀이터 놀러가봤어요!!
편하게 입힐 수 있고, 불편하지 않고 사진도 이쁘게 나와서 너무 만족해요! 
스크런치와 셋투로 사용할 수 있어 더 좋았습니다!
reviews.content_en: I had prepared this outfit for cherry blossom season, but I took it to the dog playground ahead of time to test it out!! It's easy to put on, comfortable, and photos come out so pretty that I'm really satisfied! The scrunchie can be worn as a set too, which is even better!

reviews.name: 루***
reviews.content: 편하고 옷 싫어하는 친구인데 이 옷은 한쪽이 찍찍이로 되어있어서 엄청 편하게 입혔어요! 여름직전까지 시원하게 입힐 수 있을것 같구 애견카페에서 옷 예쁘다고 이쁨 받았어요~!! 강추에요 단번에 아가씨 만들어 주는 옷♡
reviews.content_en: My friend doesn't like wearing clothes, but this outfit has velcro on one side so it was super easy to put on! It seems like it'll be comfortable to wear all the way until summer, and I got compliments at the dog cafe about how pretty the outfit is~!! Highly recommend! It's a dress that instantly turns your pup into a little lady ♡

reviews.name: 감자엄마
reviews.content:
흔하지 않고 너무 예쁜 벌룬탑💕

입히고 스타필드 갔는데 지나가는 사람들 모두 너무 예쁘다고 해주셨어요~! 털많은 2.5KG 포메인데 S사이즈 예쁘게 딱 맞아요, 스크런치는 장난으로 강아지 머리에도 씨워보고, 강아지와 커플템으로 착용하기 좋고 선물용으로도 너무 좋을거 같아요~
reviews.content_en:
Such a unique and beautiful balloon top 💕

I wore it and went to Starfield, and literally everyone passing by said how pretty it was~! My fluffy 2.5kg Pomeranian fits perfectly in size S, and the scrunchie is fun to even put on the pup's head, and it's great to wear as a matching outfit with my dog or as a gift~

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 아이가 이렇게편안해하는 옷은 첨인듯해요 고양이라서 그런지 멍멍이들옷은 겨드랑이랑 흉부가 항상 좀 불편하고 기장도 안맞고 그래서 주문제작해입혔는데 진짜 핏도 그렇고 소재도 너무좋아요
reviews.content_en: I think this is the first time my baby has been so comfortable in an outfit. Maybe because they're a cat, but dog clothes always felt a bit uncomfortable around the armpits and chest, and the length never fit right, so I usually got custom-made ones. But the fit and fabric quality on this are just so good!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
딸기 입혀봤는데 핏이 생각보다 귀엽게 나와요 😊살짝 여유 있는 핏이라 움직일 때 불편해 보이지 않고 편하게 돌아다녀요!
소재도 얇고 부드러워서요즘 같은 날씨에 가볍게 입히기 딱 좋은 느낌 👍
단추 디테일도 포인트 되고전체적으로 깔끔해서 데일리로 입히기 괜찮아요ㅎㅎ
조금 넉넉한 사이즈라 딱 맞는 느낌은 아니지만 오히려 편하게 입는 스타일이라 만족 🐾

👉 총평-편하게 입히기 좋은 데일리 옷! 귀여움은 확실히 챙김 💛
reviews.content_en:
I dressed them in the strawberry outfit and the fit turns out cuter than expected 😊 Since it's slightly roomy, they don't look uncomfortable when moving around and can walk comfortably!
The fabric is thin and soft too, so it feels perfect for wearing lightly in weather like this 👍
The button details are a nice accent and everything looks neat, so it's good for everyday wear haha
It's a bit oversized so it doesn't feel like a perfect fit, but that's actually my preferred relaxed style so I'm satisfied 🐾

👉 Overall - Great everyday outfit that's comfortable to wear! Definitely delivers on the cuteness factor 💛

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
오늘 오자마자 입혔어요~
2.7키로 아가인데 살짝 여유있지만 잘 맞아요
넘 귀욥!!
reviews.content_en:
I put it on as soon as it arrived~
My 2.7kg baby is a bit roomy in it, but it fits well
So cute!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
입혀 놓으니까 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 
강아지가 옆으로 살이 많이쪄서 .. 작을줄알고 L사이즈 주문했는데 다른 옷들에 비해 큽니다 ㄷㄷ 교환비가 더 나오는거 같아서 그냥 입혔는데 나름 괜찮아요 ㅎㅎ 
옆이 찍찍이로 되어 있어서 입히기도 편해요 ~
reviews.content_en:
It looks cute on them hehe
My dog has a lot of side weight so... I thought it would be small and ordered size L, but compared to other outfits it's bigger ㄷㄷ The exchange fee seemed like it would be more, so I just kept it on and it's actually pretty decent hehe
Since the sides have velcro, it's easy to put on too~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽고 이거 입고 나가면 다 쳐다봐용 귀엽다고~~~!!!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and everyone stares when we go out saying how cute it is~~~!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
가슴둘레 40 / 3.8kg 
하늘색 사주고 싶었는데 품절이라 🥲
블랙으로 샀는데 그냥 미친 귀여움입니다
너무너무너무귀여워요
reviews.content_en:
Chest circumference 40 / 3.8kg
I wanted to get the sky blue but it was sold out 🥲
I got the black instead and it's just insanely cute
It's so so so cute!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
여행룩으로 장만했어요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
여기 옷 좋아하는데 자주 세일해주세요..♥
reviews.content_en: Got it for a travel outfit haha 😄 My pup loves clothes from here, so I wish you'd have sales more often..♥

reviews.name: K****
reviews.content_en: The size fits perfectly and it looks like it'll be comfortable, breathable, and adorable to wear!

reviews.name: 뽀****
reviews.content: 선물용으로 사서 사진을 미처 못찍었네요. 봄나들이 딱 좋은 감성 넘치는 옷이에요 ㅎㅎ 시밀러룩으로 친구들이랑 같이 입어도 좋을 것 같아요. 저도 하나 더 사려고요!
reviews.content_en: I got it as a gift so I didn't get a chance to take photos yet. It's such a charming outfit perfect for spring outings! 😊 I think it would be cute to match with friends wearing similar styles too. I'm planning to buy one more for myself!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: It's adorable! It looks really breathable and cool.
